title: Seplat Energy sponsored the Orodje of Okpe Golf tournament - FinancialEDGE
description: Seplat Energy, a leading indigenous energy company, reaffirmed its commitment to community engagement and sports development as the headline sponsor of the 6th edition of the prestigious Orodje of Okpe Golf Tournament. The two-day tournament, held at the historic Sapele Athletic Club from March 21 to March 22, 2025, brought together over 150 golfers from
